title: 500 ml Raw Linseed Oil
features: Natural oil water resistant finish with a slightly golden colour, enhances the wood grain and colour and darkens slightly with age
Traditional Natural oil ideal for oak beams and wood Craft applications
Protects and nourishes replacing lost oils and colour
Traditional cricket bat maintenance product, oils and helps retain flexibility to prevent cracking
description: Traditional completely Natural oil from the extract of flax seed which penetrates unsealed wood leaving a Natural, water Resistant finish with a slightly enhanced Colour that darkens slightly with age.  For use on Oak beams, bean canes, cricket bats, and many Woodcraft applications and can be used as a lubricant in French polishing suitable for furniture or flooring).
